description: Anthropic Messages streaming with provider-native web_fetch server tools. Validates provider-executed tool-input streaming, tool-call emission, and web_fetch_tool_result mapping.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: Provider-executed tools must never be surfaced as locally executable function tool calls.
